items.front: What coordination updates must ARTCCs forward in oceanic operations?
items.back: Forward current flight plan and control information, coordinate in time for receiving-facility action, and forward estimate revisions of 3 minutes or more.

items.front: When is transfer of air-ground communications made when nonradar separation is being applied?
items.back: Make the transfer 5 minutes before the aircraft reaches the boundary unless the facilities agree otherwise.

items.front: How is AIDC coordination accomplished where interfacility data communications are implemented?
items.back: Use regional Interface Control Documents supported by letters of agreement between the facilities concerned.
